statements.query: MATCH (s:ProxmoxStorage {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE s.total > 0 AND (s.used * 1.0 / s.total) > 0.9 SET s.storage_risk = true, s.storage_status = 'critical'
statements.name: Mark critically full storage

statements.query: MATCH (s:ProxmoxStorage {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE s.total > 0 AND (s.used * 1.0 / s.total) > 0.8 AND (s.used * 1.0 / s.total) <= 0.9 SET s.storage_risk = true, s.storage_status = 'warning'
statements.name: Mark nearly full storage

statements.query: MATCH (s:ProxmoxStorage {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE s.enabled = false SET s.storage_risk = true, s.storage_status = 'disabled'
statements.name: Mark disabled storage

statements.__comment: Flag nodes with no available storage
statements.query: MATCH (n:ProxmoxNode {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (s:ProxmoxStorage {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID})-[:AVAILABLE_ON]->(n) } SET n.storage_risk = true
statements.name: Mark nodes without available storage

statements.__comment: Flag shared storage that is only available on one node (not truly shared)
statements.query: MATCH (s:ProxmoxStorage {cluster_id: $CLUSTER_ID}) WHERE s.shared = true AND COUNT { MATCH (s)-[:AVAILABLE_ON]->() } = 1 SET s.storage_risk = true, s.storage_status = 'shared_single_node'
statements.name: Mark shared storage on single node
